ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "movie_name" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Exact release date of the movie */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the movie */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the movie was produced in */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the movie on a scale of 1-10 */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "actors" TEXT /* Main actors in the movie */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the movie */,
  "gross_revenue" TEXT /* Gross revenue generated by the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "code" TEXT /* Short code for the country (e.g., US) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre mapping */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status type */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status type (e.g., SD, HD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, curator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* The rating value given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was submitted */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the image belongs to */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., poster, banner) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_images_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the video belongs to */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., trailer, teaser) */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_videos_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Whether the movie won the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casts" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the cast member is part of */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casts_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
